headline: Eos Energy Enterprises Launches Commercial Production at Second Manufacturing Facility
summary: Battery Line 2 at Thorn Hill, PA began commercial production after completing Site Acceptance Testing — ahead of the end-of-Q2 target. Targets ~4 GWh annual capacity by end-2026; Line 2's optimized layout cuts raw-material travel 86% and line length 40%. Line 1 already exceeded its full-year 2025 output in the first 164 days of 2026.

headline: Eos Energy Announces Record Date for Rights Offering
summary: Record date July 1, 2026 (5:00 pm ET); rights distributed July 2. Units of common stock + warrants at a ~10–20% discount to a 15–30 day VWAP, with an over-subscription privilege; proceeds fund the ~$150M Frontier Power USA contribution.
